project.name: DEKE
project.description: Domain Expert Knowledge Engine — self-improving, domain-specific knowledge base with semantic search

layers.name: Core
layers.description: Domain models (Models/) and interfaces (Interfaces/). Zero dependencies.

layers.name: Database Schema
layers.description: PostgreSQL schema with pgvector. Managed via init.sql, not migrations.

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.description: Repositories (Dapper), embeddings (ONNX), harvesters, type handlers, DI registration.

layers.name: Worker
layers.description: Background services (source monitoring, learning, pattern discovery).

codePatterns: Domain models: classes with required properties, Guid Id = Guid.NewGuid(), DateTimeOffset timestamps
DTOs: records with required init properties
Repository interfaces: Task<T?> for lookups, Task<List<T>> for collections, CancellationToken ct = default
Repository implementations: inject DbConnectionFactory, await using var conn, Dapper queries with triple-quoted strings
Vector search: Pgvector.Dapper, new Vector(embedding), cosine distance <=> operator
Embeddings: OnnxEmbeddingService.GenerateEmbedding() returns float[384], L2-normalize before storage
API endpoints: static class, MapGroup('/api/xxx').WithTags(), private static handlers, AllowAnonymous/RequireAuthorization
MCP tools: [McpServerToolType] class, [McpServerTool] method, [Description] on class and params, .WithTools<T>()
Workers: BackgroundService, ExecuteAsync with while loop, IServiceProvider.CreateScope(), Task.Delay interval
DI: ServiceCollectionExtensions with AddDekeXxx() extension methods, Singleton for config/factories, Scoped for repos
JSONB columns: register JsonbTypeHandler<T> in DapperConfig.Initialize()
Configuration: IOptions<T> for new config, manual binding for existing EmbeddingsConfig pattern
styleRules: No async void — always async Task
records for DTOs, classes for mutable entities

structuralChecks: Core changes before Infrastructure before Hosts
Core never references Infrastructure or Host projects
New Core interfaces defined before repository implementations
Every new service has a DI registration step in ServiceCollectionExtensions or host Program.cs
Database changes in init.sql match model properties (column names map via MatchNamesWithUnderscores)
patternChecks: Repositories use DbConnectionFactory, not direct NpgsqlConnection
Vector operations use Pgvector.Dapper with ::vector cast in SQL
API endpoints use static class with MapGroup pattern
Workers inherit BackgroundService with IServiceProvider.CreateScope() for scoped deps
New JSONB column types have JsonbTypeHandler<T> registered in DapperConfig.Initialize()
Type handlers registered before any repository uses them

subsystems.name: Core models/interfaces
subsystems.description: New domain types or interface changes

subsystems.name: Repositories
subsystems.description: New data access or query changes

subsystems.name: MCP Tools
subsystems.description: New or modified MCP tools for Claude integration
